title: Oishinbo
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

tags.name: Food
tags.description: Centers around cooking or food appraisal.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Live Freely in Another World With an Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
titleRomaji: Soubi Seisaku Kei Cheat de Isekai wo Jiyuu ni Ikite Ikimasu
titleEnglish: Live Freely in Another World With an Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
titleNative: 装備製作系チートで異世界を自由に生きていきます
synonyms: Sobi Seisaku Kei Chi to De Isekai Wo Jiyu Ni Ikiteikimasu
I Will Live Freely in Another World With Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
synopsis: 29-year-old Toji, a job-hopping part-time worker, got caught up in someone else getting summoned to another world. Declared a troublemaker on arrival and thrown out of the castle, he was just about to lose all hope when a status screen from an online game he used to play popped up in front of his eyes. Amazingly, Toji can use that incredibly convenient game mechanic in this new world, and he's the only one! Upgrading weapons, summoning adorable monsters... Armed with all the knowledge and wit he can muster, Toji is free to venture wherever he pleases! (Source: Alpha Manga)

tags.description: A goblin is a monstrous creature from European folklore. They are almost always small and grotesque, mischievous or outright malicious, and greedy. Sometimes with magical abilities.

title: Kiwami no Shiina
synopsis: Sena Kiwamino, who attends an elite sports school, has a special power called "Soku". One day, Ena, a dropout from the track-and-field club, saves Sena from danger, and their destinies are set in motion! However, Sena has a big secret... (Source: Manga-5, translated)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

title: Blue Ursus
synopsis: Ready to fight! Only bad girls would go to Gokumon Girls' High School. A big girl, Amaki Seina, over 180cm tall, enrolls in this rough school full of delinquents. With her extraordinary physique, she uses professional wrestling moves to defeat the delinquents one after another! What's more, she uploads clips of the fights to a video site...? What is the "personal goal" she is pursuing by picking fights with delinquents?! (Source: Manga One, translated)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Delinquents
tags.description: Features characters with a notorious image and attitude, sometimes referred to as "yankees".

tags.name: Wrestling
tags.description: Centers around the sport of wrestling.

title: Land of the Lustrous
synopsis: In a world inhabited by crystalline lifeforms called The Lustrous, every unique gem must fight for their way of life against the threat of lunarians who would turn them into decorations. Phosphophyllite, the most fragile and brittle of gems, longs to join the battle. When Phos is instead assigned to complete a natural history of their world, it sounds like a dull and pointless task. But this new job brings Phos into contact with Cinnabar, a gem forced to live in isolation. Can Phos’s seemingly mundane assignment lead both Phos and Cinnabar to the fulfillment they desire? (Source: Kodansha USA) Note: Nominated for the 8th Manga Taisho in 2015.

title: Harinezumi to Contrast
synopsis: The cool-looking handsome man's true feelings are actually full of thorns!? Akashi, a lonely virgin college student, starts working part-time to fix his timid personality, but from the very first day, his coworkers have a bad impression of him. Meanwhile, Akashi's coworker, Kagei, who has a personality completely opposite to his, treats him strangely kindly, but his true intentions are a mystery... A comedy BL about a somewhat suspicious, cheerful handsome man and a gloomy virgin who pretends to be cool. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Esper Mami
synopsis: One day Mami realizes that she has magical powers. Her mother also had those powers, as well as her grandmother. Mami slowly has to learn to live with her abilities, and she gets into a lot of trouble.

title: Nezumi's First Love
synonyms: Nezumi - Willst du mit mir morden gehen?
synopsis: Here's the sweet, bloody yakuza love story we've all been waiting for! Nezumi was raised by the mob to be an emotionless killing machine, but a chance encounter in an arcade leads to a romance at total odds with everything she's known. Equal parts ultraviolence and kawaii, Nezumi's First Love turns both the hitman and love comedy genres on their heads! (Source: Kodansha USA)

titleNative: 君の「ギザ歯」が見てみたい。
synopsis: One day, Yamato Satsuki saw the jagged teeth behind Aisu Kiraragi's mask. As he approached her, those teeth marked the beginning of a sharp and prickly romantic comedy. (Source: Square Enix, translated)

title: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou wa Slow Life wo Enjoy Shitai!: Yatto Konyaku Haki sareta noni, Daini Ouji ga Meccha Stalker Shitekurun desu kedo…
titleEnglish: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleNative: 悪役令嬢はスローライフをエンジョイしたい！～やっと婚約破棄されたのに、第二王子がめっちゃストーカーしてくるんですけど…～
synopsis: Finally, the moment she's been waiting for - her engagement annulment! At her graduation ceremony, villainess Sylvia is hit with the classic line from the crown prince: "I hereby annul our engagement!" To which Sylvia replies with a dazzling smile and an enthusiastic "Gladly!" Falsely accused of bullying her lover, Sylvia proves her innocence with a flawless alibi. She couldn't have bullied anyone while she was picking radishes in a dungeon! Armed with a hefty settlement for her troubles and her S-Rank adventurer's license, Sylvia retires to a quiet farm to finally live out her dream of taking it easy. But just as everything starts to go to plan, her ex-fiancé's younger brother, the second prince, shows up at her door suspecting treason and moves in with her, upending her easygoing life! A delightfully chaotic, sometimes wholesome, romantic adventure awaits! (Source: Magazine House, translated)

tags.name: Villainess
tags.description: Centers around or prominently features a villainous noble lady.

tags.name: Agriculture

chapterSourceTitle: Akuyaku Reijou wa Slow Life wo Enjoy Shitai!

title: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleEnglish: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
synonyms: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer.
synopsis: One day, while dungeon-diving for work, Hajime the adventurer encounters a starving girl named Rirui. The poor girl has been abandoned by her parents and has no relatives she can rely on. Unable to turn a blind eye, Hajime declares, "If you're gonna join my party, then stop crying!" So begins their life together...but as it turns out, Rirui is no ordinary little girl! (Source: K MANGA)

title: The Hunter's Gonna Lay Low
synonyms: The Hunter Wants to Live Quietly
synopsis: Life's never quiet when you've got S-Rank Rizz. Former S-Rank Hunter Ui-Jae, a.k.a. J, saved humanity from eldritch horrors emerging from dimensional rifts, only to time-leap 8 years into a future where he's presumed dead. Now a manager at a hangover soup joint, all J wants is a quiet life. But between selling off the relics of his past and catching the obsessive attention of Korea's #1 Hunter Sa-Yeong, peace isn't on the menu! (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Kimi no Yokogao shika Mirenai
titleNative: 君の横顔しか見れない
synopsis: The popular Fujimori Sachi never faces Kishimoto Arata, who sits next to her in class. No matter how hard Kishimoto tries to see her face, she brilliantly turns away from him. As a result, he has only ever seen her side profile. But she talks to him normally otherwise. This mysterious girl seems to have a secret...? A cute school romantic comedy about a girl who only shows her side profile VS a boy who won't give up ♪ Originally a web manga released on the author's Twitter account since May 7, 2019. Official serialization began in Comic Gene on August 16, 2020.

title: Mokuyobi no Ice-Cream
titleNative: 木曜日のアイスクリーム
synopsis: "When I came home from my ex-lover's funeral and entered the room where we lived together, I saw a white butterfly fly out of the refrigerator..." Contains 16 short stories in which the everyday and the extraordinary, the human and the non-human, coexist. - Azayakana Danmen (鮮やかな断面) - Na Mo Naki Asa (名もなき朝) - Platform (プラットホーム) - Kuchisake-san (くちさけさん) - Lunch Time (ランチタイム) - Nikui Tsumasaki (憎い爪先) - Semi Shirazu (蝉しらず) - Ima wa Kagiri (いまはかぎり) - Katachi ga Onajinara (かたちが同じなら) - Mayonaka, Bakubaku to (真夜中、ばくばくと) - Yoru ni Tsutsumaru (夜に包まる) - Hour Time (アワータイム) - Tanin Yogari (他人よがり) - 365 Po no Koshin (365歩の行進) - Mokuyobi (もくようび)

title: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: Danjohi 1:5 no Sekai demo Futsu ni Ikirareru to Omotta? Geki Juu Kanjou na Kanojotachi ga Mujikaku Danshi ni Honrousaretara
titleRomaji: Danjohi 1:5 no Sekai demo Futsu ni Ikirareru to Omotta? Geki Juu Kanjou na Kanojotachi ga Mujikaku Danshi ni Honrousaretara
titleNative: 男女比1：5の世界でも普通に生きられると思った？　～激重感情な彼女たちが無自覚男子に翻弄されたら～
synonyms: Did You Think You Could Live Normally Even in a World with a 1:5 Male-to-Female Ratio?
synopsis: Having arrived in a world where the male-to-female ratio is 1:5, the man Shoto tries to live an ordinary life as he did in his previous world. However, he unknowingly causes many women to fall in love with him this way, and the women develop intense feelings for him. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Fire Force
synopsis: Terror has paralyzed the clockwork metropolis of Tokyo! Possessed by demons, people have begun to burst into flame, leading to the establishment of a special firefighting team: the Fire Force, ready to roll on a moment's notice to fight spontaneous combustion anywhere it might break out. The team is about to get a very unique addition: Shinra, a boy who possesses the unique power to run at the speed of a rocket, leaving behind the famous "devil's footprints" (and destroying his shoes in the process). Can the Fire Force discover the source of this strange phenomenon and put a stop to it? Or will the city burn to ashes first? (Source: Kodansha USA) Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Takou no Koori-hime wo Tasuketara, Otomodachi kara Hajimeru Koto ni Narimashita
titleRomaji: Takou no Koori-hime wo Tasuketara, Otomodachi kara Hajimeru Koto ni Narimashita
titleNative: 他校の氷姫を助けたら、お友達から始める事になりました
synonyms: After Helping the "Ice Princess" from Another School, I Decided to Start as a Friend.
synopsis: Nagi Shinonome, known as the “Ice Princess,” is a beautiful girl with a cold attitude who does not get along with other people. One day, Souta Minori notices her being molested on the train and musters up the courage to step in and save her. The next day she comes up to him again and asks him... "I want you to stay by my side." Can Sota continue to be "just friends” with the "Ice Princess," who melts sweetly only for him? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai!
titleNative: みことちゃんは嫌われたくない!
synopsis: My beautiful, big-breasted childhood friend, Mikoto, is completely in love with me. It sounds like a dream scenario that anyone would envy — but there’s just one big problem... She’s turned into a clingy, mentally unstable mess with love that's way too heavy!! This is a dark everyday comedy about being at the mercy of Mikoto’s unstable behavior and unintentional sexiness. Note: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai! began as a web manga shared on the author's Twitter starting February 15, 2023, and has been published in print by Kadokawa since January 18, 2024.
